canonical_definition: A self-assessment personality questionnaire, based on the Myers-Briggs Type Indicator, used to classify individuals into one of four temperament groups: Rationals, Idealists, Guardians, and Artisans.
papers: Learning from Few Samples: A Novel Approach for High-Quality Malcode Generation
